sections.heading: All ponies. Start here.
sections.subheading: Sale ponies, lease ponies, show dates, catch rides, shipping leads, rail talk, and pony stories in one place.  This is the place to go if you're looking for a local and verifiable peer resource group for yourself, your students, your farm or just to be nosey.

sections.title: Where pony people connect
sections.body: This editor stores the page as JSON. Click a section in the live preview, then change the copy, images, buttons, and links on the right.

sections.title: People trust people, not platforms.
